$comment: edit_file: a surgical edit to one file in the ACTIVE WORKSPACE (the project). Reads the file, regenerates it with the change, stages+builds the WHOLE project (the oracle), repairs up to twice, logs the edit. proj = $workspace; path + request come from $input (split head/tail).
summary: Refactor a function, fix an error, or apply a change to an existing file in the active workspace; rebuild the whole project to verify and repair up to twice.
